subject: WM-0165 blocked
body: Public Web read-model decision required: GameSession projects kind=resource, but public WorldEntityKind has no resource member and ui-react renders the closed kind directly; WM-0165 cannot edit sim-protocol/ui-react. Recommended: approve public resource WorldEntityKind plus localized HUD handling/tests and add those exact files to allowedPaths. Alternatives: reviewed semantic-kind label contract, or relax the no-facility acceptance (not recommended). Web-only resident/visitor aliasing or DOM/CSS replacement would be false authority/presentation.
